zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理格局
zh.content:
当前SOL价格围绕80.8附近窄幅震荡，整体走势偏整理偏弱，未形成明确突破方向，短期多空均衡但略偏空头占优。

SMA20在80.94上方，价格略低于均线，显示短线承压；MACD为负值动能，说明下行动能仍在累积但未加速。

下方支撑关注80.60与80.30区域，上方阻力在80.95及81.20，若放量突破81则有望转为短线反弹结构。

建议观望为主，激进者可在80.6附近轻仓试多，止损80.3；反弹未突破81前不宜追高，等待方向确认。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is currently trading around 80.83 after a very tight 24-hour range between 80.63 and 80.94, signaling compressed volatility and a clear consolidation phase. Price action shows indecision, with neither buyers nor sellers managing to establish control. This kind of narrow structure typically reflects equilibrium in the market and often precedes a directional expansion once liquidity accumulates on either side of the range.

The SMA(20) at 80.945 sits just above the current price, acting as a dynamic ceiling and reinforcing mild short-term bearish pressure. Meanwhile, the MACD reading of -0.337 suggests that downside momentum is present but not aggressively accelerating. Without a visible signal line confirmation, momentum remains incomplete, implying the market is drifting rather than trending. Overall structure leans slightly bearish but lacks conviction.

On the downside, immediate support is located near 80.60, which has repeatedly contained price during the session. A deeper cushion lies around 80.50, where prior buying interest has emerged. On the upside, resistance is tightly defined at 80.94–80.95, aligning with the SMA20 and marking the key breakout threshold. A sustained move above this level could open room toward 81.20, where minor overhead supply may appear.

From a trading perspective, range-bound strategies remain most effective under current conditions. Buying near support and taking partial profits into resistance can be efficient while volatility stays compressed. Breakout traders should wait for a confirmed close beyond 80.95 or below 80.60 with volume expansion before positioning. Tight risk controls are essential, as low-momentum environments tend to produce frequent false breakouts.
